x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Untracked customizations create invisible conflicts with Now Assist configurations during upgrades. High uncaptured change rates indicate customization discipline gaps that can break Now Assist enablement.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enforce update set discipline by creating application-specific update sets for all customizations. Navigate to sys_update_set_list.do to review current update sets. All Now Assist configuration changes must be tracked in update sets.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_83f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c30
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Untracked customizations create invisible conflicts with Now Assist configurations during upgrades. High uncaptured change rates indicate customization discipline gaps that can break Now Assist enablement.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Update Set Discipline</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_update_set");
gr.addQuery("state","in progress");
gr.query();
var inProgress=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:inProgress>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:inProgress+" update sets in progress",finding:inProgress<1?"No update sets currently in progress. All customizations should be tracked in update sets to prevent conflicts with Now Assist configurations during upgrades.":""+inProgress+" update sets in progress -- customization tracking is active."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000488</number><order>90</order><remediation_guidance>Enforce update set discipline by creating application-specific update sets for all customizations. Navigate to sys_update_set_list.do to review current update sets. All Now Assist configuration changes must be tracked in update sets.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>83f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c30</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Update Set Discipline</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_83f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c30</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
